pattern: Compute transitive closure of the prerequisite DAG with Floyd-Warshall, then answer each query in O(1).
hints: Build a boolean reachability matrix reach[i][j] = True if course i is a (direct or indirect) prerequisite of j.
Apply Floyd-Warshall: if i can reach k and k can reach j then i can reach j.
Answer each query [u, v] with reach[u][v].

stress.description: sparse DAG on 50 courses with 200 random queries
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = size
    edges = set()
    for _ in range(n * 2):
        a = rng.randint(0, n - 2)
        b = rng.randint(a + 1, n - 1)
        edges.add((a, b))
    prereqs = [list(e) for e in edges]
    queries = [[rng.randint(0, n-1), rng.randint(0, n-1)] for _ in range(200)]
    queries = [[u, v] for u, v in queries if u != v]
    if not queries:
        queries = [[0, n-1]]
    return [n, prereqs, queries]
